user.title: SoCal Gas
user.description: Choose how to set up your SoCal Gas account.

menu_options.upload: Upload a Green Button data file

credentials.title: SoCal Gas Login
credentials.description:
Enter your socalgas.com login credentials for automatic daily data fetching. Your credentials are stored locally and only used to download your usage data.

If login fails, you can go back and choose file upload instead.

account_name.title: Name This Account
account_name.description: Account {account_number}, Meter {meter_number}. Give this account a friendly name.

lookback.title: Historical Data Import
lookback.description: How many days of historical data should we import? Larger values take longer on first setup.

finish.title: Ready to Import
finish.description:
Setup is complete! After you click Submit, historical data will download in the background.

You can monitor progress in the **Notifications** panel (bell icon in the sidebar). Daily updates will happen automatically after the initial import finishes.

upload.title: Upload Usage Data
upload.description:
Upload a Green Button ZIP file downloaded from socalgas.com.

To get this file: log in at socalgas.com → My Account → Analyze Usage → Download My Data (Green Button).

upload_name.title: Name This Account
upload_name.description: Give this account a friendly name.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SoCal Gas
reauth_confirm.description: Your SoCal Gas session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

error.invalid_file: Could not parse the uploaded file. Please upload a valid Green Button ZIP from socalgas.com.
error.no_data: The uploaded file contained no usage data.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to socalgas.com. The site may be rate-limiting requests — wait a few minutes and try again.

redownload.title: Re-download Data
redownload.description:
Choose a date range to re-download from socalgas.com. The earliest allowed date is **{earliest_date}**.

The download will run in the background — check the Notifications panel for progress.

upload.title: Import Additional Data
upload.description: Upload another Green Button ZIP file to import additional usage data. Duplicate data is handled automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure how often the integration refreshes data from socalgas.com.

error.invalid_file: Could not parse the uploaded file.
error.no_data: The uploaded file contained no usage data.
error.date_too_old: Start date cannot be more than 730 days (2 years) in the past.
error.end_before_start: End date must be on or after start date.

abort.redownload_started: Download started! Check the Notifications panel for progress.
